query: SELECT * FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%config%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%setting%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%whatsapp%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT * FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%config%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%setting%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%whatsapp%';
